uncle-jjs-rib-rub.name: Uncle Jj's Rib Rub
instructions: Whisk brown sugar, paprika, salt, black pepper, chili powder, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, and cayenne pepper together in a bowl until well-mixed and no lumps remain.

uncle-poohs-shrimp-sausage-and-grits.name: Uncle Pooh’s Shrimp, Sausage, And Grits
instructions: In a medium pot, stir together the milk and heavy cream over medium-high heat.
Bring to a boil.
Slowly whisk the grits into the pot. When mixture begins to bubble, reduce the heat to medium-low. Add 1 teaspoon salt and ½ teaspoon pepper.
Continue whisking the grits frequently for 10-15 minutes until mixture thickened.
Remove the grits from the heat. Add the butter and cheddar cheese, and whisk to incorporate. Set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet on medium-high heat.
Add the onions, peppers, and garlic. Sauté for 2 minutes until onions and peppers have softened.
Add the sausage. Cook until cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Slowly add the chicken stock. Stir until well-incorporated.
Add the shrimp. Cook until pink in color, about 3 minutes.
Add the cayenne, remaining teaspoon salt, and remaining ½ teaspoon black pepper. Add additional cayenne pepper, if desired.
Remove from the heat and spoon the sausage and shrimp mixture over the grits.
Sprinkle scallions on top, if desired.
Enjoy!

unleavened-bread-lezzet.name: Unleavened Bread
instructions: 1. Firstly add 2 and a glass of flour in a empty container.
2. Then add milk, liquid oil, salt, water and baking powder.
3. Mix all materials and start kneading.
4. Then add the remaining half glass flour and knead again.
5. After mixing the materials and filling the dough, wait on a edge.
6. Use a cooking mold in this range of 18-22 cm.
7. After filling the mold and lubricated, place the dough in the mold.
8. Fix the upper part and edges with spatula.
9. Lastly sprinkle sesame or poppy seeds.
10. Cook the dough 180 degrees 35-40 minutes in pre-heated oven.
11. 11. To make the knitting bread;The seal is divided into two equal parts and shape with your hands.
12. Take care of both parts to be equal length and thickness.
12. August Paste the ends of the parts together.
14 July Then pass the parts from each other.
15.   Finally, when you arrive at the bottom, just glue the pieces as you do.
16. What are the Tricks of the Yeastless Bread Recipe? Take care of the soft consistency.
17. September To avoid hardening, add flour in a controlled way.
18. Take care of kneading dough too much in the construction of non-alcand bread.
19. September The mixing of materials will be enough.
20. Oil the cooking mold and sprinkle a small amount of flour.
21. In this way, pizzle breads will be easier.
22. You can cook knitting breads in the oven tray with oil paper series.
23. Check the bread during cooking, because each oven is different in performance.
24. You can close the oven when it starts to fry over.
